title: Audit effective RBAC for a subject
description: Enumerate what a ServiceAccount or user can actually do and compare it to least-privilege intent.
body: Steps: 1. Identify the subject (SA, user, group) and its RoleBindings/ClusterRoleBindings. 2. Run kubectl auth can-i --list --as=system:serviceaccount:<ns>:<sa> to enumerate effective verbs/resources. 3. Cross-check against what the workload actually needs. 4. Flag wildcards, cluster-scope grants, and secret access not justified by the workload. 5. Propose tightened Roles and re-run can-i to confirm removals. Rollback point: before editing bindings, snapshot current ones. Validation: can-i returns 'no' for newly removed permissions and 'yes' only for required ones.
